scenarios.title: maximizes browser window and detects position and size change @edge
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the demo page, record the initial OS-level browser window position and outer size, maximize the window, then assert that both the position and the size changed.
expectedAssertions: window position after maximize differs from initial position
window outer size after maximize differs from initial size

locatorTable.notes: Absolute URL converted to relative path. Assumes baseURL = https://bonigarcia.dev/selenium-webdriver-java in playwright.config.ts. If baseURL is the bare domain, path becomes '/selenium-webdriver-java/'. Confirm before Stage 2 runs (see Q1).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: baseURL configuration unknown — assumed https://bonigarcia.dev/selenium-webdriver-java so '/' maps to the site root.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Confirm baseURL in playwright.config.ts; if baseURL = https://bonigarcia.dev, change path to '/selenium-webdriver-java/'.
